# Nelarabine 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Nelarabine 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Nelarabine</strong> 目前有 <strong>37 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Nelarabine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Nelarabine is indicated for the treatment of patients with T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukaemia (T-ALL) and T-cell lymphoblastic lymphoma (T-LBL) whose disease has not responded to or has relapsed...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>relapsing-remitting multiple sclerosis（99.4%）</li>
<li>acute lymphoblastic/lymphocytic leukemia（99.0%）</li>
<li>T-cell leukemia（98.9%）</li>
<li>chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma with immunoglobulin heavy chain variable-region gene somatic hypermutation（98.7%）</li>
<li>pregerminal center chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma（98.7%）</li>
<li>botryoid-type embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma of the vagina（98.3%）</li>
<li>Hodgkins lymphoma（98.2%）</li>
<li>rhabdomyosarcoma (disease)（98.2%）</li>
<li>extrahepatic bile duct rhabdomyosarcoma（98.1%）</li>
<li>pancreatic adenocarcinoma（98.1%）</li>
<li>embryonal extrahepatic bile duct rhabdomyosarcoma（98.1%）</li>
<li>parameningeal embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma（98.0%）</li>
<li>pancreatic carcinoma with mixed differentiation（98.0%）</li>
<li>solid pseudopapillary carcinoma of pancreas（98.0%）</li>
<li>osteoclastic giant cell tumor of pancreas（98.0%）</li>
<li>Ewing sarcoma（98.0%）</li>
<li>prostate embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma（98.0%）</li>
<li>upper aerodigestive tract neoplasm（97.9%）</li>
<li>pancreatic intraductal papillary-mucinous carcinoma（97.9%）</li>
<li>mixed ductal-endocrine carcinoma of pancreas（97.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/nelarabine/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
